description: OptionsCalc is an options strategy analysis tool for building and visualizing multi-leg options trades with payoff diagrams, Greeks, and implied-volatility modeling. It offers a free web app and a paid tier with additional saved-strategy and tracking features.
summary: OptionsCalc exposes a public MCP server at https://api.optionscalc.app/mcp; no public HTTP/GraphQL API or CLI documentation was found.
